Authentication Module PRD

This document describes the authentication requirements for the system.

Epic: User Authentication

Implement secure user authentication with OAuth2 and JWT tokens.

Task: Login Endpoint

Create POST /auth/login endpoint that validates credentials and returns JWT.

  • Accept email and password
  • Validate against database
  • Return JWT token with 24h expiry

Task: Token Refresh

Create POST /auth/refresh endpoint for token renewal.

Requirements

  • Passwords must be hashed with bcrypt
  • Tokens must be signed with RS256

Constraints

Must comply with OWASP authentication guidelines.
